title: eriogonum deflexum var. turbinatum
intro: Eriogonum deflexum var. turbinatum, also known as the "Turbinated Buckwheat," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Turbinated Buckwheat include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Turbinated Buckwheat often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
